title: Meowing?
description: Allows you to pet cats, foxes and dogs and will also make it possible to "let go" of your dog free
body:
- When you RMB the cat, you will be able to pet it and hear purring sounds. 
- When you RMB (you're also gonna need sneaking) the dog, you will be able to pet it and hear barking sounds.
- By the way, when you RMB the fox, you will be able to pet it and hear sniffing sounds.
- When you hold shears in your main hand and click RMB on your dog, you cut off its collar and it becomes a wolf.

**Additional cat/dog content is possible in the future!**
